name: Los Angeles County, CA v. Humphries
question: Are claims for declaratory relief against a local public entity subject to the requirement of Monell that the plaintiff must demonstrate that the constitutional violation was the result of the policy, custom, or practice attributable to the local public entity; or are such claims exempt as determined by the Ninth Circuit?
description: A case in which the Court held that plaintiffs seeking declaratory relief against a local public entity must demonstrate that the constitutional violation in question was the result of the public entity's policy, custom, or practice.
